units.source_text: 公允值為市場參與者之間於計量⽇期在有序交易中出售資產將會收取或轉讓負債將會⽀付的估計價格，但該⾦額與於該等⼯具的預計未來有效期內
units.translation_target_text: Fair value is the estimate of the price that would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date, but that amount is different from the expected future life of the instrument.
units.translation_en: Fair value is the estimate of the price that would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date, but that amount is different from the expected future life of the instrument.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Fair value is the estimate of the price that would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date, but that amount is different from the expected future life of the instrument.

units.source_text: 的現⾦流所產⽣的理論經濟價值可能有所不同。我們釐定並無可觀察市場價格之⼯具的公允值時，採⽤的估值⽅法及假設或會有別於其他公司所使
units.translation_target_text: The theoretical economic value generated by the cash flows may vary. When we determine the fair value of instruments for which no observable market price is available, the valuation methods and assumptions we use may differ from those used by other companies.
units.translation_en: The theoretical economic value generated by the cash flows may vary. When we determine the fair value of instruments for which no observable market price is available, the valuation methods and assumptions we use may differ from those used by other companies.

units.source_text: 於釐定同業及客⼾貸款公允值時，我們將貸款分類⾄具有類似特徵的組合內。公允值以可觀察市場交易（如有）為依據。如無可觀察市場交易，則
units.translation_target_text: When determining the fair value of loans to peers and customers, we classify loans into groups with similar characteristics. Fair value is based on observable market transactions, if any. If there are no observable market transactions, then
units.translation_en: When determining the fair value of loans to peers and customers, we classify loans into groups with similar characteristics. Fair value is based on observable market transactions, if any. If there are no observable market transactions, then

layout_variants.display_en: When determining the fair value of loans to peers and customers, we classify loans into groups with similar characteristics. Fair value is based on observable market transactions, if any. If there are no observable market transactions, then

units.source_text: 以包含⼀系列假設數據的估值模型估算公允值。該等假設可能包括：反映場外交易活動並由第三⽅經紀提供的估計價值；前瞻性現⾦流折現模型
units.translation_target_text: Fair value is estimated using a valuation model that incorporates a range of assumptions. Such assumptions may include: estimated values reflecting over-the-counter trading activity and provided by third-party brokers; forward-looking discounted cash flow models
units.translation_en: Fair value is estimated using a valuation model that incorporates a range of assumptions. Such assumptions may include: estimated values reflecting over-the-counter trading activity and provided by third-party brokers; forward-looking discounted cash flow models

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Fair value is estimated using a valuation model that incorporates a range of assumptions. Such assumptions may include: estimated values reflecting over-the-counter trading activity and provided by third-party brokers; forward-looking discounted cash flow models

units.source_text: （經計及預期客⼾提前還款率，滙豐相信這些模型運⽤的假設，與市場參與者對該等貸款進⾏估值時所⽤假設乃屬⼀致）；近期承辦類似貸款的定
units.translation_target_text: (Having taken into account expected customer prepayment rates, HSBC believes that the assumptions used in these models are consistent with those used by market participants when valuing these loans);
units.translation_en: (Having taken into account expected customer prepayment rates, HSBC believes that the assumptions used in these models are consistent with those used by market participants when valuing these loans);

units.source_text: 價；以及其他市場參與者的交易數據（包括從觀察所得的第⼀及第⼆市場交易數據）。我們可能不時委聘第三⽅估值專家計算貸款組合的公允值。
units.translation_target_text: prices; and transaction data of other market participants (including primary and secondary market transaction data obtained from observations). From time to time, we may engage third-party valuation experts to calculate the fair value of our loan portfolio.
units.translation_en: prices; and transaction data of other market participants (including primary and secondary market transaction data obtained from observations). From time to time, we may engage third-party valuation experts to calculate the fair value of our loan portfolio.

units.source_text: 貸款的公允值反映於結算⽇的預期信貸損失，以及市場參與者預期貸款有效期內所出現的信貸損失之估算額，以⾄由辦理貸款⾄結算⽇期間重新訂
units.translation_target_text: The fair value of a loan reflects the expected credit losses on the settlement date, as well as the estimated amount of credit losses that market participants expect to occur during the life of the loan, and is re-estimated from the time the loan is issued to the settlement date.
units.translation_en: The fair value of a loan reflects the expected credit losses on the settlement date, as well as the estimated amount of credit losses that market participants expect to occur during the life of the loan, and is re-estimated from the time the loan is issued to the settlement date.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The fair value of a loan reflects the expected credit losses on the settlement date, as well as the estimated amount of credit losses that market participants expect to occur during the life of the loan, and is re-estimated from the time the loan is issued to the settlement date.

units.source_text: 價的公允值影響。就信貸已減值的貸款⽽⾔，集團會將貸款預期未來可收回的現⾦流折現，以估算其公允值。
units.translation_target_text: fair value impact. For credit-impaired loans, the Group will discount the expected future cash flow of the loan to estimate its fair value.
units.translation_en: fair value impact. For credit-impaired loans, the Group will discount the expected future cash flow of the loan to estimate its fair value.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: fair value impact. For credit-impaired loans, the Group will discount the expected future cash flow of the loan to estimate its fair value.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 上市⾦融投資之公允值按買入市價釐定。非上市⾦融投資之公允值則採⽤估值⽅法釐定，當中會考慮同等有報價證券之價格及⽇後盈利來源。
units.translation_target_text: The fair value of listed financial investments is determined based on the bid market price. The fair value of unlisted financial investments is determined using valuation methods that take into account the prices of equivalent quoted securities and future sources of earnings.
units.translation_en: The fair value of listed financial investments is determined based on the bid market price. The fair value of unlisted financial investments is determined using valuation methods that take into account the prices of equivalent quoted securities and future sources of earnings.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The fair value of listed financial investments is determined based on the bid market price. The fair value of unlisted financial investments is determined using valuation methods that take into account the prices of equivalent quoted securities and future sources of earnings.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 即期存款的公允值與其賬⾯值相若。較⻑期存款的公允值採⽤現⾦流折現法估算，並以尚餘期限相若的存款之當前利率計算。
units.translation_target_text: The fair value of demand deposits approximates their carrying value. The fair value of longer-term deposits is estimated using the discounted cash flow method and is calculated based on the current interest rate on deposits with similar remaining maturities.
units.translation_en: The fair value of demand deposits approximates their carrying value. The fair value of longer-term deposits is estimated using the discounted cash flow method and is calculated based on the current interest rate on deposits with similar remaining maturities.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The fair value of demand deposits approximates their carrying value. The fair value of longer-term deposits is estimated using the discounted cash flow method and is calculated based on the current interest rate on deposits with similar remaining maturities.

units.translation_en: The notional contract amount of derivatives held for trading and derivatives designated to be accounted for using the hedge accounting method shows the face value of open transactions on the settlement date and does not represent the amount of risk assumed.

layout_variants.display_en: The notional contract amount of derivatives held for trading and derivatives designated to be accounted for using the hedge accounting method shows the face value of open transactions on the settlement date and does not represent the amount of risk assumed.

units.source_text: 按產品合約類別劃分滙豐控股及附屬公司所持衍⽣⼯具之名義合約⾦額及公允值
